projectContext.name: OPS-AGENT Platform
projectContext.description: Plataforma de agentes operativos para Sicoenginy SL, Transports Pau, y Verdemobil Espana. Monorepo Python + Next.js. 3 verticales: SicoOps (tenders 10-20k EUR), PauOps (logistica 10 camiones), TrujilloSales (comercial biometano EU). Stack: Anthropic API (Sonnet+Haiku+caching) + Supabase (pgvector) + n8n Railway + Twilio WhatsApp + Google Maps. SIN LangChain. SIN fine-tuning.
